content.text:
## ✅ Task Complete

**Created the following files for MAIY Tech Hub:**

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `server/server.ts` | Custom Socket.IO server with room join/leave, pomodoro sync, and disconnect handlers |
| `app/api/rooms/route.ts` | REST API for creating and listing study rooms (in-memory store) |
| `hooks/use-socket.ts` | React hook for Socket.IO connection management |
| `hooks/use-pomodoro.ts` | Full Pomodoro timer hook with work (25min), short break (5min), long break (15min after 4 sessions), pause/resume/reset/skip/switchPhase |
| `package.json` | Added `"server": "tsx server/server.ts"` script |

**Key features:**
- Socket.IO with CORS configured for the app URL
- Room presence tracking (user-joined, user-left events)
- Real-time Pomodoro sync across room participants
- Auto-cleanup on disconnect
- Full type safety (zero `any` types)
- `yarn type-check` passes ✅
